name: Tsatziki Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Cucumber, peeled and coarsely grated
Salt & freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a piece of cheesecloth in a colander and pour in the yogurt.
Allow the yogurt to drain for several hours.
2. Place the grated cucumber in another colander and allow to drain for 2 hours.
3. Mix together all ingredients except the additional olive oil, then chill.
4. Place in serving dishes and drizzle with additional olive oil on top.
5. Serve as a spread for bread or as a dip for vegetables. This is generally served as a first course.
Note: Store this dish covered in the refrigerator and it will keep well for 2 or 3 days.
